Ntc And Req. For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 4343 Third Steet Owners' Association.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Randolph W. Hoepfner, an individual; David B. Hale, an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Lisa Chapman sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $30,450.93
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $1,142.58
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $630.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $35,048.51
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Continued To Nov-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
